trades.name: AppLovin Corp
trades.analysis: AppLovin Corp has experienced a significant recent price decline, with shares dropping substantially over the past 21 days. No price reaction at Fibonacci golden zone, clear moving average support, or rising relative volume on a bounce was identified. This indicates a lack of a bullish swing trade setup at this time.

trades.name: Red Cat Holdings Inc
trades.analysis: Red Cat Holdings is trading above its 200-day moving average but below its 20-day moving average, indicating mixed short-term and long-term trends. There is no clear price reaction at Fibonacci retracement levels or rising relative volume on a bounce to suggest an actionable swing trade setup at present.

trades.name: Amazon.com Inc
trades.analysis: Amazon.com Inc has shown stable price movement recently, with no clear indication of a pullback to the Fibonacci golden zone or a test of key moving averages with rising relative volume. While generally bullish, no specific technical swing trade setup meeting the defined criteria was identified.

trades.name: Iris Energy Limited
trades.analysis: Iris Energy Limited is in a strong downtrend, having experienced significant price decreases and trading with well below-average volume. The company recently reported a double miss on earnings and revenue, acting as a strong negative catalyst. No bullish setup is present.

trades.name: Kratos Defense & Security Solutions Inc
trades.analysis: Kratos Defense is currently in a downtrend, trading below its key moving averages and having broken below identified support levels. Despite recent positive contract news, the price action remains bearish with below-average volume. No bullish swing trade opportunity aligns with the current technical picture.

trades.name: ProShares K-1 Free Crude Oil Strategy ETF
trades.analysis: OILK is in a clear uptrend, having gained significantly over the last month, and is currently finding support near the $52.50 level. Volume is above its 3-month average, suggesting sustained buying interest. This setup indicates a potential continuation of the upward momentum from a key support zone.
